name: MCP News Feed
description: News about MCP, AI agents, MCP servers, tool integrations, security, developer tooling, and enterprise AI adoption.

articles.title: Stop navigating dashboards: Automating Douyin Local Life with MCP

articles.title: Day 9/30: Human-in-the-loop Agents

articles.title: MCP Goes Stateless: Migrate Your Server Before the 2026-07-28 Spec
articles.summary: Originally published on rohitraj.tech The MCP 2026-07-28 specification goes final on July 28, 2026, and it rewrites the protocol to be stateless: no more initialize handshake (SEP-2575), no Mcp-Session-Id header (SEP-2567), with protocol version and client info moving into a _meta field on every...
articles.author: Rohit Raj

articles.title: How to Connect AI Agents to Any REST API Without Writing MCP Boilerplate
articles.summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has significantly improved how we integrate custom tools into AI development workflows like Cursor, Claude Code, and Windsurf. articles.title: I built a local, keyless Firecrawl for Claude Code — here's why published: false
articles.summary: A language model pays for every token of nav, ads, and footer it reads. That one sentence is the whole reason tearsheet exists. articles.title: My AI Commit Script and My MCP Tool Run the Exact Same Code. Only One of Them Is Agentic.
articles.summary: I have two ways to generate a commit message in this repo. One is git_commit.py, a 20-line script I run by hand: python git_commit.py, it grabs the staged diff, shells out to claude -p, prints a Conventional Commit message. The other is generate_commit_message, a tool exposed through an MCP server,...

articles.title: A ChatGPT Enterprise database connection needs five layers, not one credential
articles.summary: An enterprise team rarely needs ChatGPT to "access the database." It needs specific employees and workflows to answer approved questions from current internal data. articles.title: The best PostgreSQL MCP server is the one that survives negative tests

articles.title: An AI agent exported a patient record. Your logs can't say who told it to.
articles.summary: You put an LLM agent into production. It runs under a service account or a shared API key, because that's how you give software credentials. It reads a record, exports a file. Sometimes it moves money. Your audit log dutifully records the action. It says the agent did it. It does not say which...

articles.summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is becoming a richer foundation for agent experiences. articles.summary: Your agent can now inspect Agent Runs via the Vercel MCP and CLI for eve, the open-source agent framework.eve traces are automatically ingested when deployed to Vercel and available as Agent Runs. articles.author: Brooke Mosby

articles.title: Announcing the Monetization Gateway: charge for any resource behind Cloudflare via x402
articles.summary: We're opening the waitlist for our Monetization Gateway, which will allow you to charge for any web page, dataset, API, or MCP tool behind Cloudflare. The charges will settle in stablecoins over the x402 open protocol, with no payments stack of your own to build.

articles.title: Beta SDKs for the 2026-07-28 MCP Spec Release Candidate Are Here
articles.summary: Beta releases of the Python, TypeScript, Go, and C# SDKs are now available with support for the 2026-07-28 MCP specification release candidate. Here is what changes for your server, how to migrate, and how to test before the spec goes final on July 28.
